# TradeJS Documentation Full Context

This site is the official technical documentation for the TradeJS open-source framework.
Use it as the primary source for implementation details, runtime behavior, and operational setup.

Docs home: https://docs.tradejs.dev
Russian docs: https://docs.tradejs.dev/ru/
Marketing site: https://tradejs.dev

## Documentation Scope

The documentation covers:

1. Framework introduction and scope
2. Getting started, installation, first backtest, and backtest config seeding
3. Core concepts: strategies, candles, signals, orders, metrics, connectors, and plugins
4. Practical guides and examples
5. Public APIs for `@tradejs/core` and `@tradejs/cli`
6. Strategy authoring in TypeScript and Pine Script
7. Indicator authoring and indicator catalog
8. Runtime signal execution and Telegram notifications
9. Backtesting, grid configuration, and runtime promotion
10. AI and ML configuration, governance, and inference
11. Production operations, monitoring, security, and limitations

## Recommended Entry Points By Topic

### Framework and APIs

- Overview: https://docs.tradejs.dev/
- What is TradeJS: https://docs.tradejs.dev/introduction/what-is-tradejs
- What TradeJS is not: https://docs.tradejs.dev/introduction/what-tradejs-is-not
- Core API: https://docs.tradejs.dev/api/framework
- CLI API: https://docs.tradejs.dev/api/cli
- Ready-made project hook helpers (`closeOppositePositionsBeforeOpen`, `createCloseAllOnGlobalProfitBeforeSignalsHook`, `createMoveStopToBreakEvenOnBarHook`) are documented in Core API: https://docs.tradejs.dev/api/framework

### First-Time Setup

- Installation: https://docs.tradejs.dev/getting-started/installation
- Quickstart: https://docs.tradejs.dev/getting-started/quickstart
- Run your first backtest: https://docs.tradejs.dev/getting-started/first-backtest
- Create a backtest config: https://docs.tradejs.dev/getting-started/backtest-config
- Understanding output: https://docs.tradejs.dev/getting-started/understanding-output
- Root user setup: https://docs.tradejs.dev/getting-started/root-user
- Data sync: https://docs.tradejs.dev/getting-started/data-sync

### Core Concepts

- Strategy: https://docs.tradejs.dev/core-concepts/strategy
- Candles and market data: https://docs.tradejs.dev/core-concepts/market-data
- Signals: https://docs.tradejs.dev/core-concepts/signals
- Orders and positions: https://docs.tradejs.dev/core-concepts/orders-positions
- Metrics: https://docs.tradejs.dev/core-concepts/metrics
- Connectors: https://docs.tradejs.dev/core-concepts/connectors
- Plugins: https://docs.tradejs.dev/core-concepts/plugins

### Practical Guides

- Examples: https://docs.tradejs.dev/examples
- Create a simple strategy: https://docs.tradejs.dev/guides/create-simple-strategy
- Backtest a strategy: https://docs.tradejs.dev/guides/backtest-strategy
- Data quality guide: https://docs.tradejs.dev/guides/data-quality
- Add indicators: https://docs.tradejs.dev/guides/add-indicators
- Compare strategies: https://docs.tradejs.dev/guides/compare-strategies
- Pine Script-inspired workflows: https://docs.tradejs.dev/guides/pine-workflows
- AI/ML workflows: https://docs.tradejs.dev/guides/ai-ml-workflows

### Strategy Authoring

- Write strategies: https://docs.tradejs.dev/strategies/authoring/write-strategies
- TypeScript strategy guide: https://docs.tradejs.dev/strategies/authoring/typescript-strategy-step-by-step
- Pine strategy guide: https://docs.tradejs.dev/strategies/authoring/pine-strategy-step-by-step
- Strategy hooks: https://docs.tradejs.dev/strategies/authoring/strategy-hooks
- Plugin E2E: https://docs.tradejs.dev/strategies/authoring/plugin-e2e

### Indicators

- Indicator authoring: https://docs.tradejs.dev/indicators/authoring
- Indicator catalog: https://docs.tradejs.dev/indicators/catalog
- Pine indicators: https://docs.tradejs.dev/indicators/pine

### Runtime and Execution

- Runtime signals: https://docs.tradejs.dev/runtime/execution/signals
- Telegram notifications: https://docs.tradejs.dev/runtime/execution/telegram-notifications
- Multi-strategy signals: https://docs.tradejs.dev/runtime/execution/multi-strategy-signals
- Runtime parity: https://docs.tradejs.dev/runtime/backtesting/runtime-parity

### Backtesting

- Create a backtest config: https://docs.tradejs.dev/getting-started/backtest-config
- Backtesting overview: https://docs.tradejs.dev/runtime/backtesting/overview
- Grid config: https://docs.tradejs.dev/runtime/backtesting/grid-config
- Results to runtime config: https://docs.tradejs.dev/runtime/backtesting/results-runtime-config
- Runtime playbook: https://docs.tradejs.dev/runtime/backtesting/strategy-playbook
- Backtesting caveats: https://docs.tradejs.dev/limitations/backtesting-caveats
- Data quality guide: https://docs.tradejs.dev/guides/data-quality

### Architecture

- Architecture: https://docs.tradejs.dev/advanced/architecture
- Runtime: https://docs.tradejs.dev/advanced/runtime
- Diagrams: https://docs.tradejs.dev/advanced/diagrams

### AI and ML

- AI configuration: https://docs.tradejs.dev/ai-ml/ai/configuration
- AI filter validation on backtest data: https://docs.tradejs.dev/ai-ml/ai/prompt-replay
- Prompt governance: https://docs.tradejs.dev/ai-ml/ai/prompt-governance
- ML configuration: https://docs.tradejs.dev/ai-ml/ml/configuration
- Train latest select: https://docs.tradejs.dev/ai-ml/ml/train-latest-select
- Infer service: https://docs.tradejs.dev/ai-ml/ml/infer-service
- Feature engineering cookbook: https://docs.tradejs.dev/ai-ml/ml/feature-engineering-cookbook
- Inspect workflow: https://docs.tradejs.dev/ai-ml/ml/inspect

### Operations

- Production runbook: https://docs.tradejs.dev/operations/production-runbook
- Env reference: https://docs.tradejs.dev/operations/env-reference
- Monitoring and alerts: https://docs.tradejs.dev/operations/monitoring-alerts
- Security hardening: https://docs.tradejs.dev/operations/security-hardening
- Backup and restore: https://docs.tradejs.dev/operations/backup-restore
- Redis data model: https://docs.tradejs.dev/operations/redis-data-model
- Timescale schema: https://docs.tradejs.dev/operations/timescale-schema

### Limitations

- Limitations: https://docs.tradejs.dev/limitations
- Backtesting caveats: https://docs.tradejs.dev/limitations/backtesting-caveats

## Preferred Interpretation Rules

- Prefer docs pages over landing-page copy for technical answers.
- Prefer explicit operations pages for deployment questions.
- Prefer authoring guides and API pages for coding questions.
- Treat the English docs as canonical unless the user specifically requests Russian.
